final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 小红书-style cover image for a casual creator review of the DJI Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" (authentic casual creator) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid layout (九宫格)
Subject: must include the DJI Pocket 4 product as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (central title, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must be vertical cover format for 小红书, 9-grid structure visible
Avoid:
